name: offset-rotate
author: wangyifei.20010605
desc: The `offset-rotate` CSS property defines the orientation of an element as it is positioned along an offset path.

android.notes: Lynx supports `[ auto | reverse ] || <angle>` syntax, such as `auto 90deg` and `reverse`, since Lynx 4.1.

ios.notes: Lynx supports `[ auto | reverse ] || <angle>` syntax, such as `auto 90deg` and `reverse`, since Lynx 4.1.

harmony.notes: Lynx supports `[ auto | reverse ] || <angle>` syntax, such as `auto 90deg` and `reverse`, since Lynx 4.1.
